references.title: Why You Can't Pee On Antarctica
references.why: The namesake exemplar: curiosity-gap cold open, graphic punch-ins, rule-explains-the-world payoff (G-TH anchor).

references.title: NASA Is Sending Humans Back to the Moon (THIS MONTH)
references.why: Urgency-hook variant; optimism-framed stakes up top, archival punch-ins between talking-head beats.

references.title: Let's Climb a Ladder to Space - Will We Float or Fall?
references.why: Binary-question thought-experiment hook answered with escalating animated visuals.

references.title: The Next Atomic Bomb Is Made of DNA
references.why: Shock-juxtaposition headline; dread-to-explanation arc compressed into a Short.

references.title: Why all world maps are wrong
references.why: Canonical Vox horizontal explainer: wrong-premise hook, physical prop demo, motion-graphic argument.
